item.title: Officials spark backlash with controversial nuclear power plans: '[The] government intends to add more poison'
item.description:
<![CDATA["There is no need for locals to fear."
India's plan to convert aging power plants into nuclear facilities has triggered opposition in Raichur, Karnataka, where residents already struggling with pollution fear a nuclear conversion will compound their health concerns.
What's happening?
A committee from India's Union Ministry of Power visited the Raichur Thermal Power Station, according to a report from The Deccan Herald. The visit was part of a national effort to assess whether older coal plant...]]>
item.author: Christine Dulion

item.title: ಸಿಂಧನೂರು ಜಿಲ್ಲೆಗೆ ಸಿರವಾರ ತಾಲೂಕು ಸೇರ್ಪಡೆ ಮಾಡಲು ನಾವು ಬಿಡುವುದಿಲ್ಲ : ಸಚಿವ ಬೋಸರಾಜು
item.author: ವ ರ ತ ಭ ರತ

item.title: Heliborne survey in Karnataka’s Raichur sparks curiosity, concern among residents
item.description:
<![CDATA[Raichur is home to the Hutti Gold Mines, which produces around 1,700 kg of gold annually and is recognised as one of the country’s major gold mines.
The survey is being carried out over the Maliyabad forest area on the outskirts of the city, sources said.
Raichur (Karnataka), Mar 1 (PTI) A heliborne survey by the Mines and Geology Department to detect rare mineral deposits has sparked curiosity and concern among residents in Raichur district, long known as the ‘Land of Gold’ for its contributi...]]>
